/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libCTS.so.1 -o /home/yupureki/project/ConcurrentTCPServer/CTS/output/lib/libCTS.so.1.0.0 CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/ConcurrentTCPServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/InetAddr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/ThreadLoopPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/acceptor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/channel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/comm.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/cond.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/connection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/eventloop.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/lock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/poll.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/CTS_shared.dir/src/timewheel.cpp.o  -lpthread -lLogger
